full_description: BookWorm is a personalized book tracking app that allows you to log and track the books you've read. With BookWorm, you can easily keep a record of your reading history, including the titles, authors, and genres of the books you've read. The app also provides personalized recommendations based on your reading history, helping you discover new books and authors you'll love. Whether you're a casual reader or a bookworm, this app is perfect for anyone looking to stay organized and inspired. Key features include: a customizable reading log, book ratings and reviews, and a discovery section with personalized recommendations.
